books.title: Look Homeward, Angel
books.author: Thomas Wolfe
books.summary: A young man struggles to find his identity and purpose while navigating family tensions, love, and the longing for freedom in a small Southern town.

books.title: The Triumph of the Scarlet Pimpernel
books.author: Baroness Orczy
books.summary: A woman is kidnapped in order to trap her husband.

books.title: The Diary
books.author: Samuel Pepys
books.summary: The diary of a man living in London in the 17th century.

books.title: The Lives and Opinions of Eminent Philosophers
books.author: Diogenes Laërtius
books.summary: Brief biographies of the prominent philosophers of ancient Greece.

books.title: Pollyanna
books.author: Eleanor H. Porter
books.summary: An orphan’s unrelenting optimism sees her through adversity and lifts up her new community.

books.title: Getting Married
books.author: George Bernard Shaw
books.summary: On the morning of a young couple’s wedding, concerns about what is to come inspire discussions about the institution of marriage.

books.title: Plays
books.author: Zeami Motokiyo
books.summary: A collection of Zeami Motokiyo’s plays, arranged in chronological order of translation.

books.title: The Little White Bird
books.author: J. M. Barrie
books.summary: A series of adventures in London, including those of the narrator and a little boy named David, and Peter Pan.

books.title: Tarzan and the Jewels of Opar
books.author: Edgar Rice Burroughs
books.summary: After seeking the riches of Opar, Tarzan must save his wife from captivity.

books.title: John Silence Stories
books.author: Algernon Blackwood
books.summary: A physician turned detective uses his psychic abilities to solve the strange cases presented to him.

books.title: My Disillusionment in Russia
books.author: Emma Goldman
books.summary: Emma Goldman recounts her experiences living in the early Soviet Union.

books.title: Lady Audley’s Secret
books.author: M. E. Braddon
books.summary: When his friend disappears suddenly in mysterious circumstances, a young, idle barrister feels forced to investigate, even at the peril of destroying the happiness of his beloved uncle.

books.title: Running a Thousand Miles for Freedom
books.author: William Craft
books.summary: The authors escape from slavery by posing as a slaveowner and his slave.

books.title: Roads to Freedom
books.author: Bertrand Russell
books.summary: Bertrand Russell investigates the merits and potential shortcomings of different socialist tendencies.

books.title: The Iliad
books.author: Homer
books.summary: The epic poem which follows a Greek warrior who refuses to give up his prize of war.

books.title: Zuleika Dobson
books.author: Max Beerbohm
books.summary: A beautiful magician unsuspectingly casts her charms on quiet Oxford.

books.title: The Moon Pool
books.author: A. Merritt
books.summary: A group of adventurers search for their friends, who were lost while exploring the otherworldly secrets of a monument discovered on a chain of island ruins.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Andre Norton
books.summary: A collection of fantasy and science fiction short fiction by Andre Norton.

books.title: Jesus the Son of Man
books.author: Kahlil Gibran
books.summary: The life of Jesus of Nazareth is examined through the lens of the people around him.

books.title: The Cruise of the Nona
books.author: Hilaire Belloc
books.summary: Hilaire Belloc cruises around Wales and the English Channel on his sailboat, writing on a variety of topics.
